kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY STATUS REPORT
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - Episode 50 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption at the summit of Kīlauea ended abruptly at 5:10 p.m. HST on June 27. The eruption is currently paused.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
